task: Please create a children's picture book in English. Story idea: once upon a time, there is a little boy, who wants to know why stars shine. He asked his mother, she just smiled, but she said she doesn't know. The he asked his father, and his grandpa and grandma, but nobody could answer him with a real answer. So he decided to find the answer himself, he walk through the rivers, climed to the top of the highest moutains in his country. He was very happy to see a cluster of stars, they told this curious boy, they shine because they were trying to smile to the people of this world. Help me to rich this story, use detailed prompts to generate the picture book. With 15 pages for 8 years old boy.

Current task:
Please create a children's picture book in English. Story idea: once upon a time, there is a little boy, who wants to know why stars shine. He asked his mother, she just smiled, but she said she doesn't know. The he asked his father, and his grandpa and grandma, but nobody could answer him with a real answer. So he decided to find the answer himself, he walk through the rivers, climed to the top of the highest moutains in his country. He was very happy to see a cluster of stars, they told this curious boy, they shine because they were trying to smile to the people of this world. Please create a children's picture book in English. Story idea: once upon a time, there is a little boy, who wants to know why stars shine. He asked his mother, she just smiled, but she said she doesn't know. The he asked his father, and his grandpa and grandma, but nobody could answer him with a real answer. So he decided to find the answer himself, he walk through the rivers, climed to the top of the highest moutains in his country.
